name: Bean Curd Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak mushrooms in boiling water for 20 minutes. Drain, remove hard stems, and cut into quarters.
2. Cut tofu into 1/2 inch squares.
3. Cut shrimp in half lengthwise, and each half into 4 pieces. Mix with sherry and cornstarch in a bowl. Set aside.
4. Pour stock into casserole dish (large pot). Add mushrooms, tofu, and bamboo shoots. Bring to boil.
5. Simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Add shrimp and chicken. As soon as shrimp turn pink, turn off heat. Season with salt to taste.
